data.title: Healthcare Realty Trust (NYSE:HR) to announce Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 12, 2026, after market close.
data.description: Healthcare Realty Trust Incorporated, a publicly traded company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HR, disclosed that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Thursday, February 12, 2026, after the market closes. This announcement was made on January 20, 2026, in Nashville, Tennessee. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate the upcoming report to gain insights into the company's performance during that period.

data.title: Liberty Gold's Black Pine project in Idaho accepted into FAST-41 U.S. Federal Permitting Framework. TSX: LGD; OTCQX: LGDTF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 20, 2026, Liberty Gold Corp. (TSX: LGD; OTCQX: LGDTF) announced that its Black Pine Oxide Gold Project in southeastern Idaho was approved for the U.S. Federal Permitting Improvement Steering Committee Council (FPISC) FAST-41 process as a "Covered Project." This designation streamlines the permitting process for the project, which is a significant step forward for Liberty Gold.
China A50 index futures slip 0.21% in early trade.
Taiwan shares open lower, Weighted Index down 1.0%.

data.title: 2026 to begin tough for Fundstrat's Lee, but Bitcoin expected to reach new high this year. #cryptocurrency
data.description: Tom Lee, the chair of Ethereum treasury firm BitMine and a member of Fundstrat, remains optimistic about Bitcoin reaching a new peak this year.

data.title: Arcitecta to display Mediaflux data platform at Supercomputing Asia 2026, targeting HPC and large datasets.
data.description: Headquartered in Boulder, Colorado, and Melbourne, Australia, Arcitecta will be showcasing its cutting-edge Mediaflux research data management platform designed for handling HPC-scale workloads and extensive scientific data sets at the upcoming SCA/HPCAsia 2026 event. This platform is tailored to cater to the needs of managing large volumes of data efficiently and effectively.
Malaysian Palm Oil Council projects February prices to remain within 4,000–4,300 RGT/tonne range.
Nikkei pares losses, finishing the session 0.7% lower.
Fonterra eyes South Island expansion for its thriving organic division.
Asia markets fall after Trump’s Greenland rhetoric spark Wall Street rout-CNBC

data.title: Canada Carbon schedules annual & special meeting on Jan. 21, 2026 after missing annual meeting since Jan. 31, 2024.
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario, Canada, on Jan. 20, 2026, Canada Carbon Inc. (TSX-V:CCB, FF:U7N1) disclosed plans to hold their annual and special shareholder meeting on January 21, 2026. This meeting comes after failing to conduct an annual shareholder session since January 31, 2024. The decision to convene this meeting aligns with Section 4.1 of Policy 3.2 of the TSX Venture Exchange regulations.

China Vanke Wins Approval for Revised Plan to Extend Yuan Bond China Vanke secured creditor approval to extend repayment on a yuan bond, easing near-term default risk. More than 92% of holders backing the revised plan agreed after the developer added an upfront cash payment.
Platinum climbs to all-time high of $2,483.10 per ounce.
